title: oncostylis circinata
intro: Oncostylis circinata, also known as the desert pea, is a flowering plant native to Australia, known for its vibrant purple and white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oncostylis circinata include the potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or ointments, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
